analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet emphasizes global interconnection revealed by COVID-19 and asserts that multilateral cooperation is the only way forward, marking the International Day of Multilateralism and Diplomacy for Peace. Evaluation: EU1 (EU successful story) – Not referenced; no mention of EU history or achievements. EU2 (EU united) – Not referenced; no claim about EU internal unity. EU3 (EU useful for its citizens) – Not EU-internal policy utility; speaks broadly about global cooperation. EU4 (EU avant-garde actor) – No leadership/pioneering claim. EU5 (EU global champion of fair causes) – No explicit framing of EU defending rights. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world) – The tweet advocates multilateralism and global cooperation, which aligns with the EU’s narrative of supporting multilateralism and contributing to global solutions; however, the tweet does not explicitly mention the EU’s role or actions. Without explicit EU attribution, it does not clearly promote the EU-specific narrative. Conclusion: No listed EU narrative is explicitly promoted.
